claim: Systematic prompt testing with assertion-based frameworks reveals cost-accuracy-speed tradeoffs unavailable through manual testing
actionable: Use Promptfoo to systematically compare prompt variations, models, and providers with measurable assertions.
source_title: Test Driven PROMPT Engineering: Using Promptfoo to COMPARE Prompts, LLMs, and Providers.

claim: LLM rubric assertions validate semantic properties of outputs by prompting the model to evaluate its own work
actionable: Use LLM-based rubric assertions to check if outputs meet semantic criteria (e.g., "confirms this is a natural language query").
source_title: Test Driven PROMPT Engineering: Using Promptfoo to COMPARE Prompts, LLMs, and Providers.

claim: Token profiling and model comparison can reduce API costs by 4-10x while maintaining output quality
actionable: Run token usage and latency comparisons across models to identify cheaper models that solve your problem.
source_title: Test Driven PROMPT Engineering: Using Promptfoo to COMPARE Prompts, LLMs, and Providers.

claim: Regression testing detects unintended prompt quality degradation before production deployment
actionable: Implement regression test suites for prompts to catch quality drops after changes.
source_title: Test Driven PROMPT Engineering: Using Promptfoo to COMPARE Prompts, LLMs, and Providers.
